name: REDEMPTION
developer: Soomin Lee, Marcelo Vitor Toscan de Oliveira, Ryan Lafleche, Deepak Paul, Nandish Thakkar
short_description: "Redemption": A spine-chilling Stealth-Puzzle in a graveyard. Navigate as a skeleton, facing rats, zombies, and gargoyles. Use bone-throwing, parrying, hover jumping. Evolve abilities by consuming foes. Can you find redemption among the undead?
detailed_description: "Redemption" is a captivating Stealth-Puzzle adventure unfolding within the eerie confines of a graveyard. Guide our skeletal protagonist through perilous encounters with relentless foes such as rats, zombies, and gargoyles as you unravel the mysteries lurking in the shadows. Employ cunning tactics, utilizing bone-throwing prowess, masterful parrying, and nimble hover jumps to evade detection and navigate treacherous terrain. Uniquely, your abilities evolve by consuming fallen enemies, unlocking new mechanics like bone-throwing, parrying, and hover jumping. Dare you face the darkness and seek redemption in the face of the undead?
about_the_game: "Redemption" is a captivating Stealth-Puzzle adventure unfolding within the eerie confines of a graveyard. supported_languages: Korean, Gujarati, Hindi, English, Portuguese - Brazil
